summary.sosovalue: Community sentiment around SoSoValue on April 21-22, 2026, is predominantly positive, with users praising its data reliability, ETF flow reports (e.g., Wu Blockchain citing $238M BTC ETF inflows and $67.77M ETH ETF inflows), and upcoming Season 2 $SOSO airdrop snapshot expected this month, urging completion of real-user verification (RUP) to at least 60-100% eligibility and accumulation of EXP through tasks. Key discussions revolve around airdrop eligibility criteria emphasizing real-user activity over mere volume, integration with SoDEX for trading and vaults, $SOSO price stability at ~$0.42 amid bear market resilience (down only 70% since Jan 2025 launch vs. 95% for peers), and promotional referrals offering 30K EXP. Metrics show high engagement on official-like posts (e.g., 8K+ likes on market flash updates), but low non-official activity (mostly 0-5 likes), indicating buzz tied to rewards and ecosystem utility rather than organic hype.
summary.sodex: Sentiment for SoDEX is highly enthusiastic and promotional, focusing on Week 11 SoPoints leaderboard updates, vault deposits (e.g., MAG7.ssi LP for spreads/funding), v3 mainnet upgrade progress, and 150M $SOSO reward pool (~$62M) for trading spot/perps on ValueChain L1, with users sharing ranks (e.g., top 1.36%), referral rebates, and badges like 'Co-builder' or 'Advocate'. Discussions highlight performance-based rewards, separation from SoSoValue S2 (30M vs 150M $SOSO), on-chain orderbook advantages, and calls to grind activity amid dropping participation as snapshot nears. Engagement metrics peak on official posts (409 likes/13K views for SoPoints Week 11, 378 likes/7K views for vault tutorial), with community replies showing motivation but limited reach (mostly <10 likes).
summary.ssi: No significant mentions found for SSI Index specifically on April 21-22, 2026, excluding official accounts; passing references in SoDEX contexts (e.g., MAG7.ssi vaults) but no standalone discussions, sentiment analysis, or metrics.
